name: No Bake Peach Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. For the crust: Grind the almonds and set aside. Grind the dates to form a paste. Combine the ground almonds and paste to form a ball. Press into an 8-inch pie plate. Refrigerate until ready to fill.
2. Filling: Toss the peaches with maple syrup (6 tablespoons) and almond extract (1/4 teaspoon). Spoon into the pie crust and sprinkle with shredded coconut. Serve.
Note: The original recipe text contained some formatting issues, such as "-----------------------------------CRUST-----------------------------------" and "----------------------------------FILLING----------------------------------". These have been removed for clarity.
